description: These floater sandals from lotto with bright red coloured straps are perfect for those who want to explore the great outdoors. Wear this with casual tees and bermudas or denims. Upper Interconnected ankle straps, midfoot straps and toe separator made of fabric with foam backing for complete comfort Adjustable strap with clip-lock buckle Cushioned rubber footbed stitched to the outsole with textured grooves on footbed Outsole TPU rubber outsole with patterned lugs for grip and traction Sandal care Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
